description: Return the list dynamically (i.e. run-time) loaded dynamics model programs currently in use. In particular this will include all user-written dynamics model programs. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.3.0. progs,libs,args = getmodelprograms()

return_values.name: libs
return_values.description: An array of NSIZ elements specifying names of the libraries each program has been loaded from; the array index of program can be used to identify the correcponding library in this array. (output).

return_values.name: args
return_values.description: An array of NSIZ elements specifying number of arguments for each program; the array index of program can be used to identify the correcponding entry in this array. (output).
